72:             "service_url": service_result.get("service_url"),
73:         }
74: 
75:     def _create_deployment(
76:         self,
77:         name: str,
78:         image_url: str,
79:         port: int,
80:         entrypoint: Optional[str],
81:         replicas: int,
82:         env_vars: Optional[Dict[str, str]],
83:     ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
84:         from kubernetes import client
85: 
86:         env_list = []
87:         if env_vars:
88:             env_list = [client.V1EnvVar(name=k, value=v) for k, v in env_vars.items()]
89: 
90:         container = client.V1Container(

94:             env=env_list,
95:         )
96: 
97:         if entrypoint:
98:             parts = entrypoint.split()
99:             container.command = parts
100: 
101:         template = client.V1PodTemplateSpec(
102:             metadata=client.V1ObjectMeta(labels={"app": name}),
103:             spec=client.V1PodSpec(containers=[container]),
104:         )
105: 
106:         spec = client.V1DeploymentSpec(
107:             replicas=replicas,
108:             selector=client.V1LabelSelector(match_labels={"app": name}),
109:             template=template,
110:         )
111: 
112:         deployment = client.V1Deployment(
113:             api_version="apps/v1",
114:             kind="Deployment",
115:             metadata=client.V1ObjectMeta(name=name, namespace=self.namespace),
116:             spec=spec,
117:         )
118: 
119:         try:

121:         except client.exceptions.ApiException as e:
122:             if e.status == 409:
123:                 self.apps_api.patch_namespaced_deployment(name, self.namespace, deployment)
124:             else:
125:                 raise
126: 
127:         return {"name": name}

130:         from kubernetes import client
131: 
132:         spec_kwargs = {
133:             "selector": {"app": name},
134:             "ports": [client.V1ServicePort(port=port, target_port=port, node_port=node_port)],
135:             "type": "NodePort" if node_port else "ClusterIP",
136:         }
137: 
138:         service = client.V1Service(

142:             spec=client.V1ServiceSpec(**spec_kwargs),

147:         except client.exceptions.ApiException as e:

150:             else:

152:

155:             node_port = result.spec.ports[0].node_port
156:             service_url = f"http://localhost:{node_port}"
157: 
158:         return {"name": name, "node_port": node_port, "service_url": service_url}
159: 
160:     def wait_for_deployment_ready(self, name: str, timeout: int = 120) -> None:
161:         import time
162: 
163:         start = time.time()
164:         while time.time() - start < timeout:
165:             deployment = self.apps_api.read_namespaced_deployment(name, self.namespace)
166:             if deployment.status.ready_replicas == deployment.spec.replicas:
167:                 return
168:             time.sleep(2)
169:         raise TimeoutError(f"Deployment {name} not ready within {timeout} seconds")

177:             service = self.api.read_namespaced_service(name, self.namespace)

181:                 "deployment_name": name,

183:                 "replicas": deployment.spec.replicas,
184:                 "ready_replicas": deployment.status.ready_replicas or 0,
185:                 "service_url": f"http://localhost:{service.spec.ports[0].node_port}" if service.spec.type == "NodePort" else f"http://{name}.{self.namespace}.svc.cluster.local:{service.spec.ports[0].port}",
186:             }

204:         except client.exceptions.ApiException as e:
205:             if e.status != 404:
206:                 raise
207: 
208:         return {"status": "deleted", "deployment_name": name, "namespace": self.namespace}

72:             )

"""Build Runtime"""

import time
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any, Dict, Optional


class BuildRuntime:
    def __init__(self, verbose: bool = False) -> None:
        self.verbose = verbose

    def build(self, workspace_path: Path, **options: Any) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        from ..services.metadata_service import MetadataService
        from ..services.docker_service import DockerService

        self._validate_build_prerequisites(workspace_path)

        metadata_service = MetadataService(verbose=self.verbose)
        metadata = metadata_service.load_metadata(workspace_path)

<content>1: """Publish Runtime"""
2: 
3: from pathlib import Path
4: from typing import Any, Dict, Optional
5: 
6: 
7: class PublishRuntime:
8:     def __init__(self, verbose: bool = False, provider: str = "agentcube") -> None:
9:         self.verbose = verbose
10:         self.provider = provider
11: 
12:     def publish(self, workspace_path: Path, **options: Any) -> Dict[str, Any]:
13:         from .services.metadata_service import MetadataService
14: 
15:         metadata_service = MetadataService(verbose=self.verbose)
16:         metadata = metadata_service.load_metadata(workspace_path)
17: 
18:         if self.provider == "agentcube":
19:             if not metadata.router_url or not metadata.workload_manager_url:
20:                 raise ValueError("router_url and workload_manager_url are required in agent_metadata.yaml for agentcube provider")
21:             result = self._publish_cr_to_k8s(workspace_path, metadata, **options)
22:         else:
23:             result = self._publish_k8s(workspace_path, metadata, **options)
24: 
25:         self._update_publish_metadata(workspace_path, result)
26:         return result
27: 
28:     def _publish_cr_to_k8s(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, **options: Any) -> Dict[str, Any]:
29:         from .services.agentcube_provider import AgentCubeProvider
30: 
31:         namespace = options.get("namespace", "default")
32:         provider = AgentCubeProvider(namespace=namespace, verbose=self.verbose)
33: 
34:         image_url = self._prepare_image_for_publishing(workspace_path, metadata, options)
35: 
36:         result = provider.deploy_agent_runtime(
37:             agent_name=metadata.agent_name,
38:             image_url=image_url,
39:             port=metadata.port,
40:             entrypoint=metadata.entrypoint,
41:             workload_manager_url=metadata.workload_manager_url,
42:             router_url=metadata.router_url,
43:             readiness_probe_path=metadata.readiness_probe_path,
44:             readiness_probe_port=metadata.readiness_probe_port,
45:         )
46: 
47:         result["agent_name"] = metadata.agent_name
48:         return result
49: 
50:     def _publish_k8s(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, **options: Any) -> Dict[str, Any]:
51:         from .services.k8s_provider import KubernetesProvider
52: 
53:         namespace = options.get("namespace", "default")
54:         provider = KubernetesProvider(namespace=namespace, verbose=self.verbose)
55: 
56:         image_url = self._prepare_image_for_publishing(workspace_path, metadata, options)
57: 
58:         result = provider.deploy_agent(
59:             agent_name=metadata.agent_name,
60:             image_url=image_url,
61:             port=metadata.port,
62:             entrypoint=metadata.entrypoint,
63:             replicas=options.get("replicas", 1),
64:             node_port=options.get("node_port"),
65:         )
66: 
67:         provider.wait_for_deployment_ready(metadata.agent_name, timeout=120)
68: 
69:         status = provider.get_agent_status(metadata.agent_name)
70:         result["agent_name"] = metadata.agent_name
71:         result["endpoint"] = status.get("service_url")
72:         result["agent_id"] = metadata.agent_name
73:         return result
74: 
75:     def _prepare_image_for_publishing(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, options: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
76:         if options.get("image_url"):
77:             return options["image_url"]
78: 
79:         if metadata.build_mode == "local":
80:             return self._prepare_local_image(workspace_path, metadata, options)
81:         return self._prepare_cloud_image(workspace_path, metadata, options)
82: 
83:     def _prepare_local_image(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, options: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
84:         if not metadata.image:
85:             raise ValueError("No image built. Run 'build' first.")
86: 
87:         image_name = metadata.image.get("name", f"{metadata.agent_name}:latest")
88: 
89:         if options.get("image_url"):
90:             from .services.docker_service import DockerService
91: 
92:             docker_service = DockerService(verbose=self.verbose)
93:             push_result = docker_service.push_image(
94:                 image_name=image_name,
95:                 registry_url=options.get("registry_url", metadata.registry_url),
96:                 username=options.get("image_username", metadata.registry_username),
97:                 password=options.get("image_password", metadata.registry_password),
98:             )
99:             return push_result.get("pushed_image", image_name)
100: 
101:         return image_name
102: 
103:     def _prepare_cloud_image(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, options: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
104:         raise NotImplementedError("Cloud image preparation not yet implemented")
105: 
106:     def _update_publish_metadata(self, workspace_path: Path, agent_info: Dict[str, Any]) -> None:
107:         import yaml
108: 
109:         from .services.metadata_service import MetadataService
110: 
111:         metadata_service = MetadataService(verbose=self.verbose)
112:         metadata = metadata_service.load_metadata(workspace_path)
113: 
114:         if agent_info.get("agent_id"):
115:             metadata.agent_id = agent_info["agent_id"]
116:         if agent_info.get("endpoint"):
117:             metadata.agent_endpoint = agent_info["endpoint"]
118: 
119:         metadata_file = workspace_path / "agent_metadata.yaml"
120:         with open(metadata_file, "w") as f:
121:             yaml.dump(metadata.model_dump(exclude_none=True), f, default_flow_style=False, indent=2, sort_keys=False)

<content>1: """Invoke Runtime"""
2: 
3: import json
4: from pathlib import Path
5: from typing import Any, Dict, Optional, Tuple
6: 
7: 
8: class InvokeRuntime:
9:     def __init__(self, verbose: bool = False, provider: str = "agentcube") -> None:
10:         self.verbose = verbose
11:         self.provider = provider
12: 
13:     def invoke(
14:         self, workspace_path: Path, payload: Dict[str, Any], headers: Optional[Dict[str, str]] = None
15:     ) -> Any:
16:         import httpx
17: 
18:         metadata, endpoint, rewrite_url = self._validate_invoke_prerequisites(workspace_path)
19: 
20:         request_headers = headers or {}
21:         if metadata.session_id:
22:             request_headers["X-Agentcube-Session-Id"] = metadata.session_id
23: 
24:         url = endpoint
25:         if rewrite_url:
26:             url = rewrite_url
27: 
28:         with httpx.Client(timeout=120.0) as client:
29:             response = client.post(url, json=payload, headers=request_headers)
30:             response.raise_for_status()
31:             return response.json()
32: 
33:     def _validate_invoke_prerequisites(self, workspace_path: Path) -> Tuple[Any, str, str]:
34:         import yaml
35: 
36:         metadata_file = workspace_path / "agent_metadata.yaml"
37:         if not metadata_file.exists():
38:             metadata_file = workspace_path / "agent.yaml"
39:         if not metadata_file.exists():
40:             metadata_file = workspace_path / "metadata.yaml"
41: 
42:         if not metadata_file.exists():
43:             raise ValueError("No agent metadata found. Run 'pack' first.")
44: 
45:         with open(metadata_file, "r") as f:
46:             data = yaml.safe_load(f) or {}
47: 
48:         from ..services.metadata_service import AgentMetadata
49:         metadata = AgentMetadata(**data)
50: 
51:         if not metadata.agent_endpoint:
52:             raise ValueError("Agent not published. Run 'publish' first.")
53: 
54:         endpoint = metadata.agent_endpoint
55:         rewrite_url = ""
56: 
57:         if metadata.k8s_deployment and metadata.k8s_deployment.get("type") == "AgentRuntime":
58:             rewrite_url = f"{endpoint}/v1/namespaces/{metadata.k8s_deployment.get('namespace', 'default')}/agent-runtimes/{metadata.agent_name}/invocations/"
59: 
60:         return metadata, endpoint, rewrite_url

filediff.before:
"""Publish Runtime"""

from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any, Dict, Optional


class PublishRuntime:
    def __init__(self, verbose: bool = False, provider: str = "agentcube") -> None:
        self.verbose = verbose
        self.provider = provider

    def publish(self, workspace_path: Path, **options: Any) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        from .services.metadata_service import MetadataService

        metadata_service = MetadataService(verbose=self.verbose)
        metadata = metadata_service.load_metadata(workspace_path)

        if self.provider == "agentcube":
            if not metadata.router_url or not metadata.workload_manager_url:
                raise ValueError("router_url and workload_manager_url are required in agent_metadata.yaml for agentcube provider")
            result = self._publish_cr_to_k8s(workspace_path, metadata, **options)
        else:
            result = self._publish_k8s(workspace_path, metadata, **options)

        self._update_publish_metadata(workspace_path, result)
        return result

    def _publish_cr_to_k8s(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, **options: Any) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        from .services.agentcube_provider import AgentCubeProvider

        namespace = options.get("namespace", "default")
        provider = AgentCubeProvider(namespace=namespace, verbose=self.verbose)

        image_url = self._prepare_image_for_publishing(workspace_path, metadata, options)

        result = provider.deploy_agent_runtime(
            agent_name=metadata.agent_name,
            image_url=image_url,
            port=metadata.port,
            entrypoint=metadata.entrypoint,
            workload_manager_url=metadata.workload_manager_url,
            router_url=metadata.router_url,
            readiness_probe_path=metadata.readiness_probe_path,
            readiness_probe_port=metadata.readiness_probe_port,
        )

        result["agent_name"] = metadata.agent_name
        return result

    def _publish_k8s(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, **options: Any) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        from .services.k8s_provider import KubernetesProvider

        namespace = options.get("namespace", "default")
        provider = KubernetesProvider(namespace=namespace, verbose=self.verbose)

        image_url = self._prepare_image_for_publishing(workspace_path, metadata, options)

        result = provider.deploy_agent(
            agent_name=metadata.agent_name,
            image_url=image_url,
            port=metadata.port,
            entrypoint=metadata.entrypoint,
            replicas=options.get("replicas", 1),
            node_port=options.get("node_port"),
        )

        provider.wait_for_deployment_ready(metadata.agent_name, timeout=120)

        status = provider.get_agent_status(metadata.agent_name)
        result["agent_name"] = metadata.agent_name
        result["endpoint"] = status.get("service_url")
        result["agent_id"] = metadata.agent_name
        return result

    def _prepare_image_for_publishing(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, options: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
        if options.get("image_url"):
            return options["image_url"]

        if metadata.build_mode == "local":
            return self._prepare_local_image(workspace_path, metadata, options)
        return self._prepare_cloud_image(workspace_path, metadata, options)

    def _prepare_local_image(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, options: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
        if not metadata.image:
            raise ValueError("No image built. Run 'build' first.")

        image_name = metadata.image.get("name", f"{metadata.agent_name}:latest")

        if options.get("image_url"):
            from .services.docker_service import DockerService

            docker_service = DockerService(verbose=self.verbose)
            push_result = docker_service.push_image(
                image_name=image_name,
                registry_url=options.get("registry_url", metadata.registry_url),
                username=options.get("image_username", metadata.registry_username),
                password=options.get("image_password", metadata.registry_password),
            )
            return push_result.get("pushed_image", image_name)

        return image_name

    def _prepare_cloud_image(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, options: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
        raise NotImplementedError("Cloud image preparation not yet implemented")

    def _update_publish_metadata(self, workspace_path: Path, agent_info: Dict[str, Any]) -> None:
        import yaml

        from .services.metadata_service import MetadataService

        metadata_service = MetadataService(verbose=self.verbose)
        metadata = metadata_service.load_metadata(workspace_path)

        if agent_info.get("agent_id"):
            metadata.agent_id = agent_info["agent_id"]
        if agent_info.get("endpoint"):
            metadata.agent_endpoint = agent_info["endpoint"]

        metadata_file = workspace_path / "agent_metadata.yaml"
        with open(metadata_file, "w") as f:
            yaml.dump(metadata.model_dump(exclude_none=True), f, default_flow_style=False, indent=2, sort_keys=False)

"""Publish Runtime"""

from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any, Dict, Optional


class PublishRuntime:
    def __init__(self, verbose: bool = False, provider: str = "agentcube") -> None:
        self.verbose = verbose
        self.provider = provider

    def publish(self, workspace_path: Path, **options: Any) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        from ..services.metadata_service import MetadataService

        metadata_service = MetadataService(verbose=self.verbose)
        metadata = metadata_service.load_metadata(workspace_path)

        if self.provider == "agentcube":
            if not metadata.router_url or not metadata.workload_manager_url:
                raise ValueError("router_url and workload_manager_url are required in agent_metadata.yaml for agentcube provider")
            result = self._publish_cr_to_k8s(workspace_path, metadata, **options)
        else:
            result = self._publish_k8s(workspace_path, metadata, **options)

        self._update_publish_metadata(workspace_path, result)
        return result

    def _publish_cr_to_k8s(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, **options: Any) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        from .services.agentcube_provider import AgentCubeProvider

        namespace = options.get("namespace", "default")
        provider = AgentCubeProvider(namespace=namespace, verbose=self.verbose)

        image_url = self._prepare_image_for_publishing(workspace_path, metadata, options)

        result = provider.deploy_agent_runtime(
            agent_name=metadata.agent_name,
            image_url=image_url,
            port=metadata.port,
            entrypoint=metadata.entrypoint,
            workload_manager_url=metadata.workload_manager_url,
            router_url=metadata.router_url,
            readiness_probe_path=metadata.readiness_probe_path,
            readiness_probe_port=metadata.readiness_probe_port,
        )

        result["agent_name"] = metadata.agent_name
        return result

    def _publish_k8s(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, **options: Any) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        from .services.k8s_provider import KubernetesProvider

        namespace = options.get("namespace", "default")
        provider = KubernetesProvider(namespace=namespace, verbose=self.verbose)

        image_url = self._prepare_image_for_publishing(workspace_path, metadata, options)

        result = provider.deploy_agent(
            agent_name=metadata.agent_name,
            image_url=image_url,
            port=metadata.port,
            entrypoint=metadata.entrypoint,
            replicas=options.get("replicas", 1),
            node_port=options.get("node_port"),
        )

        provider.wait_for_deployment_ready(metadata.agent_name, timeout=120)

        status = provider.get_agent_status(metadata.agent_name)
        result["agent_name"] = metadata.agent_name
        result["endpoint"] = status.get("service_url")
        result["agent_id"] = metadata.agent_name
        return result

    def _prepare_image_for_publishing(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, options: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
        if options.get("image_url"):
            return options["image_url"]

        if metadata.build_mode == "local":
            return self._prepare_local_image(workspace_path, metadata, options)
        return self._prepare_cloud_image(workspace_path, metadata, options)

    def _prepare_local_image(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, options: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
        if not metadata.image:
            raise ValueError("No image built. Run 'build' first.")

        image_name = metadata.image.get("name", f"{metadata.agent_name}:latest")

        if options.get("image_url"):
            from .services.docker_service import DockerService

            docker_service = DockerService(verbose=self.verbose)
            push_result = docker_service.push_image(
                image_name=image_name,
                registry_url=options.get("registry_url", metadata.registry_url),
                username=options.get("image_username", metadata.registry_username),
                password=options.get("image_password", metadata.registry_password),
            )
            return push_result.get("pushed_image", image_name)

        return image_name

    def _prepare_cloud_image(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, options: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
        raise NotImplementedError("Cloud image preparation not yet implemented")

    def _update_publish_metadata(self, workspace_path: Path, agent_info: Dict[str, Any]) -> None:
        import yaml

        from .services.metadata_service import MetadataService

        metadata_service = MetadataService(verbose=self.verbose)
        metadata = metadata_service.load_metadata(workspace_path)

        if agent_info.get("agent_id"):
            metadata.agent_id = agent_info["agent_id"]
        if agent_info.get("endpoint"):
            metadata.agent_endpoint = agent_info["endpoint"]

        metadata_file = workspace_path / "agent_metadata.yaml"
        with open(metadata_file, "w") as f:
            yaml.dump(metadata.model_dump(exclude_none=True), f, default_flow_style=False, indent=2, sort_keys=False)

"""Publish Runtime"""

from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any, Dict, Optional


class PublishRuntime:
    def __init__(self, verbose: bool = False, provider: str = "agentcube") -> None:
        self.verbose = verbose
        self.provider = provider

    def publish(self, workspace_path: Path, **options: Any) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        from ..services.metadata_service import MetadataService

        metadata_service = MetadataService(verbose=self.verbose)
        metadata = metadata_service.load_metadata(workspace_path)

        if self.provider == "agentcube":
            if not metadata.router_url or not metadata.workload_manager_url:
                raise ValueError("router_url and workload_manager_url are required in agent_metadata.yaml for agentcube provider")
            result = self._publish_cr_to_k8s(workspace_path, metadata, **options)
        else:
            result = self._publish_k8s(workspace_path, metadata, **options)

        self._update_publish_metadata(workspace_path, result)
        return result

    def _publish_cr_to_k8s(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, **options: Any) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        from .services.agentcube_provider import AgentCubeProvider

        namespace = options.get("namespace", "default")
        provider = AgentCubeProvider(namespace=namespace, verbose=self.verbose)

        image_url = self._prepare_image_for_publishing(workspace_path, metadata, options)

        result = provider.deploy_agent_runtime(
            agent_name=metadata.agent_name,
            image_url=image_url,
            port=metadata.port,
            entrypoint=metadata.entrypoint,
            workload_manager_url=metadata.workload_manager_url,
            router_url=metadata.router_url,
            readiness_probe_path=metadata.readiness_probe_path,
            readiness_probe_port=metadata.readiness_probe_port,
        )

        result["agent_name"] = metadata.agent_name
        return result

    def _publish_k8s(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, **options: Any) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        from .services.k8s_provider import KubernetesProvider

        namespace = options.get("namespace", "default")
        provider = KubernetesProvider(namespace=namespace, verbose=self.verbose)

        image_url = self._prepare_image_for_publishing(workspace_path, metadata, options)

        result = provider.deploy_agent(
            agent_name=metadata.agent_name,
            image_url=image_url,
            port=metadata.port,
            entrypoint=metadata.entrypoint,
            replicas=options.get("replicas", 1),
            node_port=options.get("node_port"),
        )

        provider.wait_for_deployment_ready(metadata.agent_name, timeout=120)

        status = provider.get_agent_status(metadata.agent_name)
        result["agent_name"] = metadata.agent_name
        result["endpoint"] = status.get("service_url")
        result["agent_id"] = metadata.agent_name
        return result

    def _prepare_image_for_publishing(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, options: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
        if options.get("image_url"):
            return options["image_url"]

        if metadata.build_mode == "local":
            return self._prepare_local_image(workspace_path, metadata, options)
        return self._prepare_cloud_image(workspace_path, metadata, options)

    def _prepare_local_image(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, options: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
        if not metadata.image:
            raise ValueError("No image built. Run 'build' first.")

        image_name = metadata.image.get("name", f"{metadata.agent_name}:latest")

        if options.get("image_url"):
            from .services.docker_service import DockerService

            docker_service = DockerService(verbose=self.verbose)
            push_result = docker_service.push_image(
                image_name=image_name,
                registry_url=options.get("registry_url", metadata.registry_url),
                username=options.get("image_username", metadata.registry_username),
                password=options.get("image_password", metadata.registry_password),
            )
            return push_result.get("pushed_image", image_name)

        return image_name

    def _prepare_cloud_image(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, options: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
        raise NotImplementedError("Cloud image preparation not yet implemented")

    def _update_publish_metadata(self, workspace_path: Path, agent_info: Dict[str, Any]) -> None:
        import yaml

        from .services.metadata_service import MetadataService

        metadata_service = MetadataService(verbose=self.verbose)
        metadata = metadata_service.load_metadata(workspace_path)

        if agent_info.get("agent_id"):
            metadata.agent_id = agent_info["agent_id"]
        if agent_info.get("endpoint"):
            metadata.agent_endpoint = agent_info["endpoint"]

        metadata_file = workspace_path / "agent_metadata.yaml"
        with open(metadata_file, "w") as f:
            yaml.dump(metadata.model_dump(exclude_none=True), f, default_flow_style=False, indent=2, sort_keys=False)

"""Publish Runtime"""

from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any, Dict, Optional


class PublishRuntime:
    def __init__(self, verbose: bool = False, provider: str = "agentcube") -> None:
        self.verbose = verbose
        self.provider = provider

    def publish(self, workspace_path: Path, **options: Any) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        from ..services.metadata_service import MetadataService

        metadata_service = MetadataService(verbose=self.verbose)
        metadata = metadata_service.load_metadata(workspace_path)

        if self.provider == "agentcube":
            if not metadata.router_url or not metadata.workload_manager_url:
                raise ValueError("router_url and workload_manager_url are required in agent_metadata.yaml for agentcube provider")
            result = self._publish_cr_to_k8s(workspace_path, metadata, **options)
        else:
            result = self._publish_k8s(workspace_path, metadata, **options)

        self._update_publish_metadata(workspace_path, result)
        return result

    def _publish_cr_to_k8s(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, **options: Any) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        from ..services.agentcube_provider import AgentCubeProvider

        namespace = options.get("namespace", "default")
        provider = AgentCubeProvider(namespace=namespace, verbose=self.verbose)

        image_url = self._prepare_image_for_publishing(workspace_path, metadata, options)

        result = provider.deploy_agent_runtime(
            agent_name=metadata.agent_name,
            image_url=image_url,
            port=metadata.port,
            entrypoint=metadata.entrypoint,
            workload_manager_url=metadata.workload_manager_url,
            router_url=metadata.router_url,
            readiness_probe_path=metadata.readiness_probe_path,
            readiness_probe_port=metadata.readiness_probe_port,
        )

        result["agent_name"] = metadata.agent_name
        return result

    def _publish_k8s(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, **options: Any) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        from .services.k8s_provider import KubernetesProvider

        namespace = options.get("namespace", "default")
        provider = KubernetesProvider(namespace=namespace, verbose=self.verbose)

        image_url = self._prepare_image_for_publishing(workspace_path, metadata, options)

        result = provider.deploy_agent(
            agent_name=metadata.agent_name,
            image_url=image_url,
            port=metadata.port,
            entrypoint=metadata.entrypoint,
            replicas=options.get("replicas", 1),
            node_port=options.get("node_port"),
        )

        provider.wait_for_deployment_ready(metadata.agent_name, timeout=120)

        status = provider.get_agent_status(metadata.agent_name)
        result["agent_name"] = metadata.agent_name
        result["endpoint"] = status.get("service_url")
        result["agent_id"] = metadata.agent_name
        return result

    def _prepare_image_for_publishing(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, options: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
        if options.get("image_url"):
            return options["image_url"]

        if metadata.build_mode == "local":
            return self._prepare_local_image(workspace_path, metadata, options)
        return self._prepare_cloud_image(workspace_path, metadata, options)

    def _prepare_local_image(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, options: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
        if not metadata.image:
            raise ValueError("No image built. Run 'build' first.")

        image_name = metadata.image.get("name", f"{metadata.agent_name}:latest")

        if options.get("image_url"):
            from .services.docker_service import DockerService

            docker_service = DockerService(verbose=self.verbose)
            push_result = docker_service.push_image(
                image_name=image_name,
                registry_url=options.get("registry_url", metadata.registry_url),
                username=options.get("image_username", metadata.registry_username),
                password=options.get("image_password", metadata.registry_password),
            )
            return push_result.get("pushed_image", image_name)

        return image_name

    def _prepare_cloud_image(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, options: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
        raise NotImplementedError("Cloud image preparation not yet implemented")

    def _update_publish_metadata(self, workspace_path: Path, agent_info: Dict[str, Any]) -> None:
        import yaml

        from .services.metadata_service import MetadataService

        metadata_service = MetadataService(verbose=self.verbose)
        metadata = metadata_service.load_metadata(workspace_path)

        if agent_info.get("agent_id"):
            metadata.agent_id = agent_info["agent_id"]
        if agent_info.get("endpoint"):
            metadata.agent_endpoint = agent_info["endpoint"]

        metadata_file = workspace_path / "agent_metadata.yaml"
        with open(metadata_file, "w") as f:
            yaml.dump(metadata.model_dump(exclude_none=True), f, default_flow_style=False, indent=2, sort_keys=False)

filediff.before:
"""Publish Runtime"""

from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any, Dict, Optional


class PublishRuntime:
    def __init__(self, verbose: bool = False, provider: str = "agentcube") -> None:
        self.verbose = verbose
        self.provider = provider

    def publish(self, workspace_path: Path, **options: Any) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        from ..services.metadata_service import MetadataService

        metadata_service = MetadataService(verbose=self.verbose)
        metadata = metadata_service.load_metadata(workspace_path)

        if self.provider == "agentcube":
            if not metadata.router_url or not metadata.workload_manager_url:
                raise ValueError("router_url and workload_manager_url are required in agent_metadata.yaml for agentcube provider")
            result = self._publish_cr_to_k8s(workspace_path, metadata, **options)
        else:
            result = self._publish_k8s(workspace_path, metadata, **options)

        self._update_publish_metadata(workspace_path, result)
        return result

    def _publish_cr_to_k8s(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, **options: Any) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        from ..services.agentcube_provider import AgentCubeProvider

        namespace = options.get("namespace", "default")
        provider = AgentCubeProvider(namespace=namespace, verbose=self.verbose)

        image_url = self._prepare_image_for_publishing(workspace_path, metadata, options)

        result = provider.deploy_agent_runtime(
            agent_name=metadata.agent_name,
            image_url=image_url,
            port=metadata.port,
            entrypoint=metadata.entrypoint,
            workload_manager_url=metadata.workload_manager_url,
            router_url=metadata.router_url,
            readiness_probe_path=metadata.readiness_probe_path,
            readiness_probe_port=metadata.readiness_probe_port,
        )

        result["agent_name"] = metadata.agent_name
        return result

    def _publish_k8s(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, **options: Any) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        from .services.k8s_provider import KubernetesProvider

        namespace = options.get("namespace", "default")
        provider = KubernetesProvider(namespace=namespace, verbose=self.verbose)

        image_url = self._prepare_image_for_publishing(workspace_path, metadata, options)

        result = provider.deploy_agent(
            agent_name=metadata.agent_name,
            image_url=image_url,
            port=metadata.port,
            entrypoint=metadata.entrypoint,
            replicas=options.get("replicas", 1),
            node_port=options.get("node_port"),
        )

        provider.wait_for_deployment_ready(metadata.agent_name, timeout=120)

        status = provider.get_agent_status(metadata.agent_name)
        result["agent_name"] = metadata.agent_name
        result["endpoint"] = status.get("service_url")
        result["agent_id"] = metadata.agent_name
        return result

    def _prepare_image_for_publishing(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, options: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
        if options.get("image_url"):
            return options["image_url"]

        if metadata.build_mode == "local":
            return self._prepare_local_image(workspace_path, metadata, options)
        return self._prepare_cloud_image(workspace_path, metadata, options)

    def _prepare_local_image(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, options: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
        if not metadata.image:
            raise ValueError("No image built. Run 'build' first.")

        image_name = metadata.image.get("name", f"{metadata.agent_name}:latest")

        if options.get("image_url"):
            from .services.docker_service import DockerService

            docker_service = DockerService(verbose=self.verbose)
            push_result = docker_service.push_image(
                image_name=image_name,
                registry_url=options.get("registry_url", metadata.registry_url),
                username=options.get("image_username", metadata.registry_username),
                password=options.get("image_password", metadata.registry_password),
            )
            return push_result.get("pushed_image", image_name)

        return image_name

    def _prepare_cloud_image(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, options: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
        raise NotImplementedError("Cloud image preparation not yet implemented")

    def _update_publish_metadata(self, workspace_path: Path, agent_info: Dict[str, Any]) -> None:
        import yaml

        from .services.metadata_service import MetadataService

        metadata_service = MetadataService(verbose=self.verbose)
        metadata = metadata_service.load_metadata(workspace_path)

        if agent_info.get("agent_id"):
            metadata.agent_id = agent_info["agent_id"]
        if agent_info.get("endpoint"):
            metadata.agent_endpoint = agent_info["endpoint"]

        metadata_file = workspace_path / "agent_metadata.yaml"
        with open(metadata_file, "w") as f:
            yaml.dump(metadata.model_dump(exclude_none=True), f, default_flow_style=False, indent=2, sort_keys=False)

"""Publish Runtime"""

from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any, Dict, Optional


class PublishRuntime:
    def __init__(self, verbose: bool = False, provider: str = "agentcube") -> None:
        self.verbose = verbose
        self.provider = provider

    def publish(self, workspace_path: Path, **options: Any) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        from ..services.metadata_service import MetadataService

        metadata_service = MetadataService(verbose=self.verbose)
        metadata = metadata_service.load_metadata(workspace_path)

        if self.provider == "agentcube":
            if not metadata.router_url or not metadata.workload_manager_url:
                raise ValueError("router_url and workload_manager_url are required in agent_metadata.yaml for agentcube provider")
            result = self._publish_cr_to_k8s(workspace_path, metadata, **options)
        else:
            result = self._publish_k8s(workspace_path, metadata, **options)

        self._update_publish_metadata(workspace_path, result)
        return result

    def _publish_cr_to_k8s(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, **options: Any) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        from ..services.agentcube_provider import AgentCubeProvider

        namespace = options.get("namespace", "default")
        provider = AgentCubeProvider(namespace=namespace, verbose=self.verbose)

        image_url = self._prepare_image_for_publishing(workspace_path, metadata, options)

        result = provider.deploy_agent_runtime(
            agent_name=metadata.agent_name,
            image_url=image_url,
            port=metadata.port,
            entrypoint=metadata.entrypoint,
            workload_manager_url=metadata.workload_manager_url,
            router_url=metadata.router_url,
            readiness_probe_path=metadata.readiness_probe_path,
            readiness_probe_port=metadata.readiness_probe_port,
        )

        result["agent_name"] = metadata.agent_name
        return result

    def _publish_k8s(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, **options: Any) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        from ..services.k8s_provider import KubernetesProvider

        namespace = options.get("namespace", "default")
        provider = KubernetesProvider(namespace=namespace, verbose=self.verbose)

        image_url = self._prepare_image_for_publishing(workspace_path, metadata, options)

        result = provider.deploy_agent(
            agent_name=metadata.agent_name,
            image_url=image_url,
            port=metadata.port,
            entrypoint=metadata.entrypoint,
            replicas=options.get("replicas", 1),
            node_port=options.get("node_port"),
        )

        provider.wait_for_deployment_ready(metadata.agent_name, timeout=120)

        status = provider.get_agent_status(metadata.agent_name)
        result["agent_name"] = metadata.agent_name
        result["endpoint"] = status.get("service_url")
        result["agent_id"] = metadata.agent_name
        return result

    def _prepare_image_for_publishing(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, options: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
        if options.get("image_url"):
            return options["image_url"]

        if metadata.build_mode == "local":
            return self._prepare_local_image(workspace_path, metadata, options)
        return self._prepare_cloud_image(workspace_path, metadata, options)

    def _prepare_local_image(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, options: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
        if not metadata.image:
            raise ValueError("No image built. Run 'build' first.")

        image_name = metadata.image.get("name", f"{metadata.agent_name}:latest")

        if options.get("image_url"):
            from .services.docker_service import DockerService

            docker_service = DockerService(verbose=self.verbose)
            push_result = docker_service.push_image(
                image_name=image_name,
                registry_url=options.get("registry_url", metadata.registry_url),
                username=options.get("image_username", metadata.registry_username),
                password=options.get("image_password", metadata.registry_password),
            )
            return push_result.get("pushed_image", image_name)

        return image_name

    def _prepare_cloud_image(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, options: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
        raise NotImplementedError("Cloud image preparation not yet implemented")

    def _update_publish_metadata(self, workspace_path: Path, agent_info: Dict[str, Any]) -> None:
        import yaml

        from .services.metadata_service import MetadataService

        metadata_service = MetadataService(verbose=self.verbose)
        metadata = metadata_service.load_metadata(workspace_path)

        if agent_info.get("agent_id"):
            metadata.agent_id = agent_info["agent_id"]
        if agent_info.get("endpoint"):
            metadata.agent_endpoint = agent_info["endpoint"]

        metadata_file = workspace_path / "agent_metadata.yaml"
        with open(metadata_file, "w") as f:
            yaml.dump(metadata.model_dump(exclude_none=True), f, default_flow_style=False, indent=2, sort_keys=False)

filediff.before:
"""Publish Runtime"""

from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any, Dict, Optional


class PublishRuntime:
    def __init__(self, verbose: bool = False, provider: str = "agentcube") -> None:
        self.verbose = verbose
        self.provider = provider

    def publish(self, workspace_path: Path, **options: Any) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        from ..services.metadata_service import MetadataService

        metadata_service = MetadataService(verbose=self.verbose)
        metadata = metadata_service.load_metadata(workspace_path)

        if self.provider == "agentcube":
            if not metadata.router_url or not metadata.workload_manager_url:
                raise ValueError("router_url and workload_manager_url are required in agent_metadata.yaml for agentcube provider")
            result = self._publish_cr_to_k8s(workspace_path, metadata, **options)
        else:
            result = self._publish_k8s(workspace_path, metadata, **options)

        self._update_publish_metadata(workspace_path, result)
        return result

    def _publish_cr_to_k8s(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, **options: Any) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        from ..services.agentcube_provider import AgentCubeProvider

        namespace = options.get("namespace", "default")
        provider = AgentCubeProvider(namespace=namespace, verbose=self.verbose)

        image_url = self._prepare_image_for_publishing(workspace_path, metadata, options)

        result = provider.deploy_agent_runtime(
            agent_name=metadata.agent_name,
            image_url=image_url,
            port=metadata.port,
            entrypoint=metadata.entrypoint,
            workload_manager_url=metadata.workload_manager_url,
            router_url=metadata.router_url,
            readiness_probe_path=metadata.readiness_probe_path,
            readiness_probe_port=metadata.readiness_probe_port,
        )

        result["agent_name"] = metadata.agent_name
        return result

    def _publish_k8s(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, **options: Any) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        from ..services.k8s_provider import KubernetesProvider

        namespace = options.get("namespace", "default")
        provider = KubernetesProvider(namespace=namespace, verbose=self.verbose)

        image_url = self._prepare_image_for_publishing(workspace_path, metadata, options)

        result = provider.deploy_agent(
            agent_name=metadata.agent_name,
            image_url=image_url,
            port=metadata.port,
            entrypoint=metadata.entrypoint,
            replicas=options.get("replicas", 1),
            node_port=options.get("node_port"),
        )

        provider.wait_for_deployment_ready(metadata.agent_name, timeout=120)

        status = provider.get_agent_status(metadata.agent_name)
        result["agent_name"] = metadata.agent_name
        result["endpoint"] = status.get("service_url")
        result["agent_id"] = metadata.agent_name
        return result

    def _prepare_image_for_publishing(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, options: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
        if options.get("image_url"):
            return options["image_url"]

        if metadata.build_mode == "local":
            return self._prepare_local_image(workspace_path, metadata, options)
        return self._prepare_cloud_image(workspace_path, metadata, options)

    def _prepare_local_image(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, options: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
        if not metadata.image:
            raise ValueError("No image built. Run 'build' first.")

        image_name = metadata.image.get("name", f"{metadata.agent_name}:latest")

        if options.get("image_url"):
            from .services.docker_service import DockerService

            docker_service = DockerService(verbose=self.verbose)
            push_result = docker_service.push_image(
                image_name=image_name,
                registry_url=options.get("registry_url", metadata.registry_url),
                username=options.get("image_username", metadata.registry_username),
                password=options.get("image_password", metadata.registry_password),
            )
            return push_result.get("pushed_image", image_name)

        return image_name

    def _prepare_cloud_image(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, options: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
        raise NotImplementedError("Cloud image preparation not yet implemented")

    def _update_publish_metadata(self, workspace_path: Path, agent_info: Dict[str, Any]) -> None:
        import yaml

        from .services.metadata_service import MetadataService

        metadata_service = MetadataService(verbose=self.verbose)
        metadata = metadata_service.load_metadata(workspace_path)

        if agent_info.get("agent_id"):
            metadata.agent_id = agent_info["agent_id"]
        if agent_info.get("endpoint"):
            metadata.agent_endpoint = agent_info["endpoint"]

        metadata_file = workspace_path / "agent_metadata.yaml"
        with open(metadata_file, "w") as f:
            yaml.dump(metadata.model_dump(exclude_none=True), f, default_flow_style=False, indent=2, sort_keys=False)

"""Publish Runtime"""

from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any, Dict, Optional


class PublishRuntime:
    def __init__(self, verbose: bool = False, provider: str = "agentcube") -> None:
        self.verbose = verbose
        self.provider = provider

    def publish(self, workspace_path: Path, **options: Any) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        from ..services.metadata_service import MetadataService

        metadata_service = MetadataService(verbose=self.verbose)
        metadata = metadata_service.load_metadata(workspace_path)

        if self.provider == "agentcube":
            if not metadata.router_url or not metadata.workload_manager_url:
                raise ValueError("router_url and workload_manager_url are required in agent_metadata.yaml for agentcube provider")
            result = self._publish_cr_to_k8s(workspace_path, metadata, **options)
        else:
            result = self._publish_k8s(workspace_path, metadata, **options)

        self._update_publish_metadata(workspace_path, result)
        return result

    def _publish_cr_to_k8s(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, **options: Any) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        from ..services.agentcube_provider import AgentCubeProvider

        namespace = options.get("namespace", "default")
        provider = AgentCubeProvider(namespace=namespace, verbose=self.verbose)

        image_url = self._prepare_image_for_publishing(workspace_path, metadata, options)

        result = provider.deploy_agent_runtime(
            agent_name=metadata.agent_name,
            image_url=image_url,
            port=metadata.port,
            entrypoint=metadata.entrypoint,
            workload_manager_url=metadata.workload_manager_url,
            router_url=metadata.router_url,
            readiness_probe_path=metadata.readiness_probe_path,
            readiness_probe_port=metadata.readiness_probe_port,
        )

        result["agent_name"] = metadata.agent_name
        return result

    def _publish_k8s(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, **options: Any) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        from ..services.k8s_provider import KubernetesProvider

        namespace = options.get("namespace", "default")
        provider = KubernetesProvider(namespace=namespace, verbose=self.verbose)

        image_url = self._prepare_image_for_publishing(workspace_path, metadata, options)

        result = provider.deploy_agent(
            agent_name=metadata.agent_name,
            image_url=image_url,
            port=metadata.port,
            entrypoint=metadata.entrypoint,
            replicas=options.get("replicas", 1),
            node_port=options.get("node_port"),
        )

        provider.wait_for_deployment_ready(metadata.agent_name, timeout=120)

        status = provider.get_agent_status(metadata.agent_name)
        result["agent_name"] = metadata.agent_name
        result["endpoint"] = status.get("service_url")
        result["agent_id"] = metadata.agent_name
        return result

    def _prepare_image_for_publishing(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, options: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
        if options.get("image_url"):
            return options["image_url"]

        if metadata.build_mode == "local":
            return self._prepare_local_image(workspace_path, metadata, options)
        return self._prepare_cloud_image(workspace_path, metadata, options)

    def _prepare_local_image(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, options: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
        if not metadata.image:
            raise ValueError("No image built. Run 'build' first.")

        image_name = metadata.image.get("name", f"{metadata.agent_name}:latest")

        if options.get("image_url"):
            from ..services.docker_service import DockerService

            docker_service = DockerService(verbose=self.verbose)
            push_result = docker_service.push_image(
                image_name=image_name,
                registry_url=options.get("registry_url", metadata.registry_url),
                username=options.get("image_username", metadata.registry_username),
                password=options.get("image_password", metadata.registry_password),
            )
            return push_result.get("pushed_image", image_name)

        return image_name

    def _prepare_cloud_image(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, options: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
        raise NotImplementedError("Cloud image preparation not yet implemented")

    def _update_publish_metadata(self, workspace_path: Path, agent_info: Dict[str, Any]) -> None:
        import yaml

        from .services.metadata_service import MetadataService

        metadata_service = MetadataService(verbose=self.verbose)
        metadata = metadata_service.load_metadata(workspace_path)

        if agent_info.get("agent_id"):
            metadata.agent_id = agent_info["agent_id"]
        if agent_info.get("endpoint"):
            metadata.agent_endpoint = agent_info["endpoint"]

        metadata_file = workspace_path / "agent_metadata.yaml"
        with open(metadata_file, "w") as f:
            yaml.dump(metadata.model_dump(exclude_none=True), f, default_flow_style=False, indent=2, sort_keys=False)

filediff.before:
"""Publish Runtime"""

from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any, Dict, Optional


class PublishRuntime:
    def __init__(self, verbose: bool = False, provider: str = "agentcube") -> None:
        self.verbose = verbose
        self.provider = provider

    def publish(self, workspace_path: Path, **options: Any) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        from ..services.metadata_service import MetadataService

        metadata_service = MetadataService(verbose=self.verbose)
        metadata = metadata_service.load_metadata(workspace_path)

        if self.provider == "agentcube":
            if not metadata.router_url or not metadata.workload_manager_url:
                raise ValueError("router_url and workload_manager_url are required in agent_metadata.yaml for agentcube provider")
            result = self._publish_cr_to_k8s(workspace_path, metadata, **options)
        else:
            result = self._publish_k8s(workspace_path, metadata, **options)

        self._update_publish_metadata(workspace_path, result)
        return result

    def _publish_cr_to_k8s(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, **options: Any) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        from ..services.agentcube_provider import AgentCubeProvider

        namespace = options.get("namespace", "default")
        provider = AgentCubeProvider(namespace=namespace, verbose=self.verbose)

        image_url = self._prepare_image_for_publishing(workspace_path, metadata, options)

        result = provider.deploy_agent_runtime(
            agent_name=metadata.agent_name,
            image_url=image_url,
            port=metadata.port,
            entrypoint=metadata.entrypoint,
            workload_manager_url=metadata.workload_manager_url,
            router_url=metadata.router_url,
            readiness_probe_path=metadata.readiness_probe_path,
            readiness_probe_port=metadata.readiness_probe_port,
        )

        result["agent_name"] = metadata.agent_name
        return result

    def _publish_k8s(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, **options: Any) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        from ..services.k8s_provider import KubernetesProvider

        namespace = options.get("namespace", "default")
        provider = KubernetesProvider(namespace=namespace, verbose=self.verbose)

        image_url = self._prepare_image_for_publishing(workspace_path, metadata, options)

        result = provider.deploy_agent(
            agent_name=metadata.agent_name,
            image_url=image_url,
            port=metadata.port,
            entrypoint=metadata.entrypoint,
            replicas=options.get("replicas", 1),
            node_port=options.get("node_port"),
        )

        provider.wait_for_deployment_ready(metadata.agent_name, timeout=120)

        status = provider.get_agent_status(metadata.agent_name)
        result["agent_name"] = metadata.agent_name
        result["endpoint"] = status.get("service_url")
        result["agent_id"] = metadata.agent_name
        return result

    def _prepare_image_for_publishing(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, options: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
        if options.get("image_url"):
            return options["image_url"]

        if metadata.build_mode == "local":
            return self._prepare_local_image(workspace_path, metadata, options)
        return self._prepare_cloud_image(workspace_path, metadata, options)

    def _prepare_local_image(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, options: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
        if not metadata.image:
            raise ValueError("No image built. Run 'build' first.")

        image_name = metadata.image.get("name", f"{metadata.agent_name}:latest")

        if options.get("image_url"):
            from ..services.docker_service import DockerService

            docker_service = DockerService(verbose=self.verbose)
            push_result = docker_service.push_image(
                image_name=image_name,
                registry_url=options.get("registry_url", metadata.registry_url),
                username=options.get("image_username", metadata.registry_username),
                password=options.get("image_password", metadata.registry_password),
            )
            return push_result.get("pushed_image", image_name)

        return image_name

    def _prepare_cloud_image(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, options: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
        raise NotImplementedError("Cloud image preparation not yet implemented")

    def _update_publish_metadata(self, workspace_path: Path, agent_info: Dict[str, Any]) -> None:
        import yaml

        from .services.metadata_service import MetadataService

        metadata_service = MetadataService(verbose=self.verbose)
        metadata = metadata_service.load_metadata(workspace_path)

        if agent_info.get("agent_id"):
            metadata.agent_id = agent_info["agent_id"]
        if agent_info.get("endpoint"):
            metadata.agent_endpoint = agent_info["endpoint"]

        metadata_file = workspace_path / "agent_metadata.yaml"
        with open(metadata_file, "w") as f:
            yaml.dump(metadata.model_dump(exclude_none=True), f, default_flow_style=False, indent=2, sort_keys=False)

from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any, Dict, Optional


class PublishRuntime:
    def __init__(self, verbose: bool = False, provider: str = "agentcube") -> None:
        self.verbose = verbose
        self.provider = provider

    def publish(self, workspace_path: Path, **options: Any) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        from ..services.metadata_service import MetadataService

        metadata_service = MetadataService(verbose=self.verbose)
        metadata = metadata_service.load_metadata(workspace_path)

        if self.provider == "agentcube":
            if not metadata.router_url or not metadata.workload_manager_url:
                raise ValueError("router_url and workload_manager_url are required in agent_metadata.yaml for agentcube provider")
            result = self._publish_cr_to_k8s(workspace_path, metadata, **options)
        else:
            result = self._publish_k8s(workspace_path, metadata, **options)

        self._update_publish_metadata(workspace_path, result)
        return result

    def _publish_cr_to_k8s(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, **options: Any) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        from ..services.agentcube_provider import AgentCubeProvider

        namespace = options.get("namespace", "default")

        image_url = self._prepare_image_for_publishing(workspace_path, metadata, options)

        result = provider.deploy_agent_runtime(
            agent_name=metadata.agent_name,
            image_url=image_url,
            port=metadata.port,
            entrypoint=metadata.entrypoint,
            workload_manager_url=metadata.workload_manager_url,
            router_url=metadata.router_url,
            readiness_probe_path=metadata.readiness_probe_path,
            readiness_probe_port=metadata.readiness_probe_port,
        )

        result["agent_name"] = metadata.agent_name
        return result

    def _publish_k8s(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, **options: Any) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        from ..services.k8s_provider import KubernetesProvider

        namespace = options.get("namespace", "default")
        provider = KubernetesProvider(namespace=namespace, verbose=self.verbose)

        image_url = self._prepare_image_for_publishing(workspace_path, metadata, options)

        result = provider.deploy_agent(
            agent_name=metadata.agent_name,
            image_url=image_url,
            port=metadata.port,
            entrypoint=metadata.entrypoint,

            node_port=options.get("node_port"),
        )

        provider.wait_for_deployment_ready(metadata.agent_name, timeout=120)

        status = provider.get_agent_status(metadata.agent_name)
        result["agent_name"] = metadata.agent_name
        result["endpoint"] = status.get("service_url")
        result["agent_id"] = metadata.agent_name
        return result

    def _prepare_image_for_publishing(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, options: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
        if options.get("image_url"):
            return options["image_url"]

        if metadata.build_mode == "local":
            return self._prepare_local_image(workspace_path, metadata, options)
        return self._prepare_cloud_image(workspace_path, metadata, options)

    def _prepare_local_image(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, options: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
        if not metadata.image:
            raise ValueError("No image built. Run 'build' first.")

        image_name = metadata.image.get("name", f"{metadata.agent_name}:latest")

        if options.get("image_url"):
            from ..services.docker_service import DockerService

            docker_service = DockerService(verbose=self.verbose)
            push_result = docker_service.push_image(
                image_name=image_name,
                registry_url=options.get("registry_url", metadata.registry_url),
                username=options.get("image_username", metadata.registry_username),
                password=options.get("image_password", metadata.registry_password),
            )
            return push_result.get("pushed_image", image_name)

        return image_name

    def _prepare_cloud_image(self, workspace_path: Path, metadata: Any, options: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
        raise NotImplementedError("Cloud image preparation not yet implemented")

    def _update_publish_metadata(self, workspace_path: Path, agent_info: Dict[str, Any]) -> None:
        import yaml

        from ..services.metadata_service import MetadataService

        metadata_service = MetadataService(verbose=self.verbose)

        if agent_info.get("agent_id"):

            metadata.agent_endpoint = agent_info["endpoint"]

2: 
3: import sys

17: app = typer.Typer(
18:     name="agentcube",
19:     help="AgentCube CLI - A developer tool for AI agent lifecycle management.",
20:     no_args_is_help=True,
21:     rich_markup_mode="rich",
22:     add_completion=False,
23: )
24: 
25: console = Console()
26: 
27: 
28: def version_callback(value: bool) -> None:
29:     if value:
30:         console.print(f"[bold]AgentCube CLI (kubectl agentcube) version: {__version__}[/bold]")
31:         raise typer.Exit()
32: 
33: 
34: def _handle_error(e: Exception, command_name: str, verbose: bool) -> None:
35:     console.print(f"[red]Error {command_name}: {e}[/red]")
36:     if verbose:
37:         traceback.print_exc()
38:     raise typer.Exit(1)
39: 
40: 
41: @app.callback()
42: def main(
43:     version: Optional[bool] = typer.Option(
44:         None,
45:         "--version",
46:         help="Show version and exit",
47:         callback=version_callback,
48:         is_eager=True,
49:     ),
50:     verbose: bool = typer.Option(False, "--verbose", "-v", help="Enable verbose output"),
51: ) -> None:
52:     """AgentCube CLI - A developer tool for AI agent lifecycle management."""
53:     if verbose:
54:         import logging
55:         logging.basicConfig(level=logging.DEBUG)
56: 
57: 
58: @app.command()
59: def pack(
60:     workspace: str = typer.Option(".", "-f", "--workspace", help="Path to the agent workspace directory", show_default=True),
61:     agent_name: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--agent-name", help="Override the agent name"),
62:     language: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--language", help="Programming language (python, java)"),
63:     entrypoint: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--entrypoint", help="Override the entrypoint command"),
64:     port: Optional[int] = typer.Option(None, "--port", help="Port to expose in the Dockerfile"),
65:     build_mode: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--build-mode", help="Build strategy: local or cloud"),
66:     description: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--description", help="Agent description"),
67:     output: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--output", help="Output path for packaged workspace"),
68:     verbose: bool = typer.Option(False, "--verbose", help="Enable detailed logging"),
69: ) -> None:
70:     """Package an agent workspace."""
71:     try:
72:         runtime = PackRuntime(verbose=verbose)
73:         options = {
74:             "agent_name": agent_name,
75:             "language": language,
76:             "entrypoint": entrypoint,
77:             "port": port,
78:             "build_mode": build_mode,
79:             "description": description,
80:             "output": output,
81:         }
82:         options = {k: v for k, v in options.items() if v is not None}
83: 
84:         with Progress(
85:             SpinnerColumn(),
86:             TextColumn("[progress.description]{task.description}"),
87:             console=console,
88:         ) as progress:
89:             progress.add_task("Packaging agent...", total=None)

91: 
92:         console.print(f"[green]Successfully packaged agent: {result.get('agent_name', 'unknown')}[/green]")
93:         console.print(f"  Workspace: {result.get('workspace_path', workspace)}")
94:         console.print(f"  Metadata: {result.get('metadata_path', 'agent_metadata.yaml')}")
95:     except Exception as e:
96:         _handle_error(e, "pack", verbose)
97: 
98: 
99: @app.command()
100: def build(
101:     workspace: str = typer.Option(".", "-f", "--workspace", help="Path to the agent workspace directory", show_default=True),
102:     proxy: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "-p", "--proxy", help="Custom proxy URL for dependency resolution"),
103:     cloud_provider: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--cloud-provider", help="Cloud provider name"),
104:     output: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--output", help="Output path for build artifacts"),
105:     verbose: bool = typer.Option(False, "--verbose", help="Enable detailed logging"),
106: ) -> None:
107:     """Build a container image from a packaged workspace."""

111:             "proxy": proxy,

113:             "output": output,

120:             console=console,
121:         ) as progress:

129:     except Exception as e:

135:     workspace: str = typer.Option(".", "-f", "--workspace", help="Path to the agent workspace directory", show_default=True),
136:     version: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--version", help="Semantic version string"),
137:     image_url: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--image-url", help="Image repository URL"),
138:     image_username: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--image-username", help="Username for image repository"),
139:     image_password: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--image-password", help="Password for image repository"),
140:     description: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--description", help="Agent description"),
141:     region: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--region", help="Deployment region"),
142:     cloud_provider: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--cloud-provider", help="Cloud provider name"),
143:     provider: str = typer.Option("agentcube", "--provider", help="Target provider: 'agentcube' or 'k8s'"),
144:     node_port: Optional[int] = typer.Option(None, "--node-port", help="NodePort for K8s deployment"),
145:     replicas: Optional[int] = typer.Option(None, "--replicas", help="Number of replicas"),
146:     namespace: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--namespace", help="Deployment namespace"),
147:     verbose: bool = typer.Option(False, "--verbose", help="Enable detailed logging"),
148: ) -> None:
149:     """Publish/deploy an agent."""
150:     try:
151:         runtime = PublishRuntime(verbose=verbose, provider=provider)
152:         options = {
153:             "version": version,
154:             "image_url": image_url,
155:             "image_username": image_username,
156:             "image_password": image_password,
157:             "description": description,
158:             "region": region,
159:             "cloud_provider": cloud_provider,
160:             "node_port": node_port,
161:             "replicas": replicas,
162:             "namespace": namespace,
163:         }
164:         options = {k: v for k, v in options.items() if v is not None}
165: 
166:         with Progress(
167:             SpinnerColumn(),
168:             TextColumn("[progress.description]{task.description}"),
169:             console=console,
170:         ) as progress:
171:             progress.add_task("Publishing agent...", total=None)
172:             result = runtime.publish(Path(workspace), **options)
173: 
174:         console.print(f"[green]Successfully published agent: {result.get('agent_name', 'unknown')}[/green]")
175:         console.print(f"  Agent ID: {result.get('agent_id', 'N/A')}")
176:         console.print(f"  Endpoint: {result.get('endpoint', 'N/A')}")
177:     except Exception as e:
178:         _handle_error(e, "publish", verbose)
179: 
180: 
181: @app.command()
182: def invoke(
183:     workspace: str = typer.Option(".", "-f", "--workspace", help="Path to the agent workspace directory", show_default=True),
184:     payload: str = typer.Option("{}", "--payload", help="JSON-formatted input passed to the agent"),
185:     header_list: Optional[List[str]] = typer.Option(None, "--header", help="Custom HTTP headers (key:value)"),
186:     provider: str = typer.Option("agentcube", "--provider", help="Target provider"),
187:     verbose: bool = typer.Option(False, "--verbose", help="Enable detailed logging"),
188: ) -> None:
189:     """Invoke a published agent."""
190:     import json
191: 
192:     try:
193:         try:
194:             payload_dict = json.loads(payload)
195:         except json.JSONDecodeError:
196:             console.print("[red]Invalid JSON payload[/red]")
197:             raise typer.Exit(1)
198: 
199:         headers = {}
200:         if header_list:
201:             for h in header_list:
202:                 if ":" not in h:
203:                     console.print("[red]Header must be in format 'key:value'[/red]")
204:                     raise typer.Exit(1)
205:                 key, value = h.split(":", 1)
206:                 headers[key.strip()] = value.strip()
207: 
208:         runtime = InvokeRuntime(verbose=verbose, provider=provider)
209:         result = runtime.invoke(Path(workspace), payload_dict, headers=headers if headers else None)
210: 
211:         console.print("[green]Invocation result:[/green]")
212:         console.print_json(json.dumps(result) if isinstance(result, dict) else str(result))
213:     except Exception as e:
214:         _handle_error(e, "invoke", verbose)
215: 
216: 
217: @app.command()
218: def status(
219:     workspace: str = typer.Option(".", "-f", "--workspace", help="Path to the agent workspace directory", show_default=True),
220:     provider: str = typer.Option("agentcube", "--provider", help="Target provider"),
221:     verbose: bool = typer.Option(False, "--verbose", help="Enable detailed logging"),
222: ) -> None:
223:     """Get agent status."""
224:     try:
225:         runtime = StatusRuntime(verbose=verbose, provider=provider)
226:         result = runtime.get_status(Path(workspace), provider=provider)
227: 
228:         if result.get("status") == "not_published":
229:             console.print("[yellow]Agent not published. Run 'publish' first.[/yellow]")
230:             raise typer.Exit(1)
231: 
232:         table = Table(title="Agent Status")
233:         table.add_column("Property", style="cyan")
234:         table.add_column("Value", style="green")
235: 
236:         for key, value in result.items():
237:             table.add_row(str(key), str(value))
238: 
239:         console.print(table)
240:     except Exception as e:
241:         _handle_error(e, "status", verbose)
242: 
243: 
244: if __name__ == "__main__":
245:     app()

(End of file - total 245 lines)

49:         """Create a new session and initialize data plane client."""

<type>file</type>
<content>1: # AgentCube CLI (cli-toolkit) — Design
2: 
3: Source root: `/tmp/agentcube-ref/cmd/cli/`.
4: 
5: ## Package layout (every module path and role)
6: 
7: | Path | Role |
8: |------|------|
9: | `pyproject.toml` | Project metadata, dependencies, console script mapping |
10: | `agentcube/__init__.py` | Package version `__version__`, exports `app`, runtimes |
11: | `agentcube/cli/__init__.py` | CLI subpackage marker |
12: | `agentcube/cli/main.py` | Typer `app`, all commands, `_handle_error`, `version_callback` |
13: | `agentcube/models/pack_models.py` | `MetadataOptions` dataclass |
14: | `agentcube/runtime/__init__.py` | Re-exports runtimes + `MetadataOptions` |
15: | `agentcube/runtime/pack_runtime.py` | `PackRuntime` |
16: | `agentcube/runtime/build_runtime.py` | `BuildRuntime` |
17: | `agentcube/runtime/publish_runtime.py` | `PublishRuntime` |
18: | `agentcube/runtime/invoke_runtime.py` | `InvokeRuntime` |
19: | `agentcube/runtime/status_runtime.py` | `StatusRuntime` |
20: | `agentcube/services/__init__.py` | Services package docstring |
21: | `agentcube/services/metadata_service.py` | `AgentMetadata`, `MetadataService` |
22: | `agentcube/services/docker_service.py` | `DockerService` |
23: | `agentcube/services/k8s_provider.py` | `KubernetesProvider` |
24: | `agentcube/services/agentcube_provider.py` | `AgentCubeProvider` |
25: | `agentcube/operations/__init__.py` | Placeholder module docstring (no symbols) |
26: | `examples/hello-agent/main.py` | Example agent |
27: | `examples/math-agent/main.py` | Example agent |
28: 
29: **Setuptools packages** (from `pyproject.toml` `[tool.setuptools]`):  
30: `agentcube`, `agentcube.cli`, `agentcube.runtime`, `agentcube.operations`, `agentcube.services`  
31: *(Note: `agentcube.models` is not listed in `[tool.setuptools] packages` but is imported; packaging may rely on setuptools discovery for subpackages — reconstruct imports from source as above.)*
32: 
33: ## Console script entry point
34: 
35: ```toml
36: [project.scripts]
37: kubectl-agentcube = "agentcube.cli.main:app"
38: ```
39: 
40: Typer app object: `app = typer.Typer(name="agentcube", help="...", no_args_is_help=True, rich_markup_mode="rich", add_completion=False)`.
41: 
42: ## Typer — root callback
43: 
44: ```python
45: def main(
46:     version: Optional[bool] = typer.Option(
47:         None, "--version", help="Show version and exit",
48:         callback=version_callback, is_eager=True,
49:     ),
50:     verbose: bool = typer.Option(False, "--verbose", "-v", help="Enable verbose output"),
51: ) -> None:
52:     """AgentCube CLI - A developer tool for AI agent lifecycle management."""
53: ```
54: 
55: ## Typer — `pack`
56: 
57: ```python
58: def pack(
59:     workspace: str = typer.Option(".", "-f", "--workspace", help="Path to the agent workspace directory", show_default=True),
60:     agent_name: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--agent-name", help="Override the agent name"),
61:     language: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--language", help="Programming language (python, java)"),
62:     entrypoint: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--entrypoint", help="Override the entrypoint command"),
63:     port: Optional[int] = typer.Option(None, "--port", help="Port to expose in the Dockerfile"),
64:     build_mode: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--build-mode", help="Build strategy: local or cloud"),
65:     description: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--description", help="Agent description"),
66:     output: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--output", help="Output path for packaged workspace"),
67:     verbose: bool = typer.Option(False, "--verbose", help="Enable detailed logging"),
68: ) -> None:
69: ```
70: 
71: ## Typer — `build`
72: 
73: ```python
74: def build(
75:     workspace: str = typer.Option(".", "-f", "--workspace", help="Path to the agent workspace directory", show_default=True),
76:     proxy: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "-p", "--proxy", help="Custom proxy URL for dependency resolution"),
77:     cloud_provider: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--cloud-provider", help="Cloud provider name (e.g., huawei)"),
78:     output: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--output", help="Output path for build artifacts"),
79:     verbose: bool = typer.Option(False, "--verbose", help="Enable detailed logging"),
80: ) -> None:
81: ```
82: 
83: ## Typer — `publish`
84: 
85: ```python
86: def publish(
87:     workspace: str = typer.Option(".", "-f", "--workspace", help="Path to the agent workspace directory", show_default=True),
88:     version: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--version", help="Semantic version string (e.g., v1.0.0)"),
89:     image_url: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--image-url", help="Image repository URL (required in local build mode)"),
90:     image_username: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--image-username", help="Username for image repository"),
91:     image_password: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--image-password", help="Password for image repository"),
92:     description: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--description", help="Agent description"),
93:     region: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--region", help="Deployment region"),

342: Validators: `validate_language` → `['python','java']` lowercase; `validate_build_mode` → `['local','cloud']` lowercase; `validate_port` → `1..65535`.
